chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 197 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 959/2023 3.For hearing of main case 22-02-2023 Both petitioners are present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State along with ASI/I.O Sonharo Khan Bulo, P.S, Baiji Sharif (respondent No.5). ****** Respondent No.5/I.O of Crime No.04 of 2023, registered at P.S, Baiji Sharif under Section 365-B PPC is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Aisha Bibi (petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and freewill and is leading a happy life with petitioner No.2 in a pleasant atmosphere. She further stated that her maternal uncle (respondent No.7) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the FIR, lodged at his Police Station. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of the I.O do not press this petition further, which stands disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
